{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Li Ten Jana
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Ten Jana]] is someone [[Kelsa]] might fight.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
